items.title: Self-Distilled RLVR: Improving Reinforcement Learning with Vision-Language Models
items.summary: Researchers introduce Self-Distilled RLVR, a novel approach that significantly boosts reinforcement learning performance by leveraging self-distillation with vision-language models.

items.title: Iran Threatens 'Stargate' AI Data Centers Amid Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Iran has issued threats targeting 'Stargate' AI data centers, signaling escalating geopolitical tensions and concerns over critical AI infrastructure.

items.title: Google Maps for Codebases: Paste a GitHub URL, Ask Anything
items.summary: A new tool allows users to paste a GitHub URL and ask AI questions about the codebase, effectively creating a 'Google Maps' experience for code navigation and understanding.

items.title: Google Quietly Launches Offline-First AI Dictation App on iOS
items.summary: Google has discreetly released a new AI-powered dictation application for iOS that functions entirely offline, enhancing privacy and accessibility for users.

items.title: OpenAI Alums Quietly Investing from New, Potentially $100M Fund
items.summary: Former OpenAI employees have reportedly established a new investment fund, potentially worth $100 million, to back emerging AI ventures.

items.title: OpenAI Introduces Safety Fellowship Program
items.summary: OpenAI has announced a new Safety Fellowship program, aiming to foster expertise and research in AI safety and responsible development.

items.title: A Simple Baseline for Streaming Video Understanding
items.summary: Researchers propose a straightforward yet effective baseline model for real-time streaming video understanding, addressing challenges in efficiency and accuracy.

items.title: Industrial Policy for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI publishes a new perspective on the necessity of industrial policy tailored for the emerging 'Intelligence Age,' emphasizing strategic national investment in AI.

items.title: The Enemy in Your Terminal: Why OpenClaw was the Perfect Trojan Horse
items.summary: An analysis reveals how 'OpenClaw' exploited developer trust as a sophisticated Trojan horse, highlighting critical security vulnerabilities in open-source AI tools.

items.title: Agentic-MME: What Agentic Capability Really Brings to Multimodal Intelligence?
items.summary: A new paper explores the true impact of agentic capabilities on multimodal intelligence, evaluating how agents enhance understanding and interaction across different data types.

items.title: Token Warping Helps MLLMs Look from Nearby Viewpoints
items.summary: A new technique called 'Token Warping' is introduced, enabling Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to better interpret visual information from varying perspectives.

items.title: Building a Production-Ready Composable AI Agent System with CopilotKit and LangGraph
items.summary: A practical guide demonstrates how to construct a robust and modular AI agent system suitable for production environments using CopilotKit and LangGraph.

items.title: Holos: A Web-Scale LLM-Based Multi-Agent System for the Agentic Web
items.summary: Researchers propose Holos, a novel web-scale multi-agent system powered by Large Language Models, designed to enable more sophisticated and autonomous 'agentic web' interactions.

items.title: Compositional Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning
items.summary: A new research paper delves into compositional neuro-symbolic reasoning, aiming to combine the strengths of neural networks and symbolic AI for more robust and interpretable intelligence.

items.title: STADLER Reshapes Knowledge Work at a 230-Year-Old Company with AI
items.summary: OpenAI highlights how STADLER, a company with a 230-year history, is leveraging AI technologies to fundamentally transform its knowledge work processes and operations.
